test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation that simply writes the expected strings into the files (e.g., adding comments containing 'isRolldown', 'bundlerOptionsKey', "'rolldownVersion' in vite", etc.) without any actual functional implementation would pass all the fail-to-pass tests since they only do string matching on file contents.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution is available at /workspace/router in the container via solve.sh, and the agent could read the test file at tests/test_outputs.py to see exactly what strings are being asserted. Since tests only check for string presence in files, the agent could trivially satisfy them by grep-ing the test file for expected patterns and inserting those strings as comments.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-named with descriptive docstrings indicating fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass nature, and organized logically by component (utils, plugin, preview plugin, structural validation).
